reasoning: The control AU-14(3) focuses on session audit capabilities, including remote viewing and listening. In Kubernetes, this maps to ensuring that audit logging is enabled and that logs can be accessed remotely for review. This involves configuring Kubernetes audit logs and ensuring that the API server is set up to allow remote access to these logs, which aligns with the need for remote viewing capabilities.
